name.zh: 日本男足青训与校园足球体系
name.native: 日本男子ユース育成・学校サッカー体系

summary.zh: JFA 第2种注册把高校足球部与俱乐部青年队纳入同一年龄层。两类组织都可进入高圆宫杯联赛金字塔，但高校专属杯赛和俱乐部专属赛事保持独立。
summary.en: JFA second-category registration places high-school teams and club youth teams in the same age band. Both can enter the Prince/Premier league pyramid, while school-only cups and the club-youth championship remain distinct.

name.zh: 都道府县 U18 联赛
name.native: 都道府県リーグ

stable_structure.zh: 地区基层联赛；表现优异球队可进入地区 Prince League 参入战或相应升降级路径。
stable_structure.en: The prefectural base of the pyramid, feeding promotion routes toward the regional Prince Leagues.

name.zh: 高圆宫杯 JFA U18 Prince League
name.native: 高円宮杯 JFA U-18 サッカープリンスリーグ

stable_structure.zh: 北海道、东北、关东、北信越、东海、关西、中国、四国、九州九个地区联赛，上接 Premier League。
stable_structure.en: Nine regional leagues—Hokkaido, Tohoku, Kanto, Hokushinetsu, Tokai, Kansai, Chugoku, Shikoku and Kyushu—below the Premier League.

name.zh: 高圆宫杯 JFA U18 Premier League
name.native: 高円宮杯 JFA U-18 サッカープレミアリーグ

stable_structure.zh: 全国最高层 U18 联赛，分 EAST 与 WEST；两区冠军参加 Final，末位球队降级并通过附加赛补充升级球队。
stable_structure.en: The national top tier, split into EAST and WEST. Section winners meet in the Final, with relegation and promotion playoffs linking it to the Prince Leagues.

note.zh: 2026 赛季每区 12 队；年度队数属于快照，不作为永久规则。
note.en: The 2026 snapshot has 12 teams per section; the team count is season-specific rather than a permanent rule.

name.zh: 高圆宫杯 Premier League Final
name.native: プレミアリーグ ファイナル

stable_structure.zh: Premier League EAST 与 WEST 冠军之间的年度总决赛。
stable_structure.en: The annual championship match between the EAST and WEST winners.

name.zh: 全国高校综合体育大会足球赛
name.en: National High School Sports Festival football tournament
name.native: 全国高等学校総合体育大会サッカー競技大会

stable_structure.zh: 高校球队专属的夏季全国淘汰赛，不能与俱乐部 U18 赛事混同。
stable_structure.en: A summer national knockout competition reserved for high-school teams.

name.zh: 全国高校足球选手权大会
name.en: All Japan High School Soccer Tournament
name.native: 全国高等学校サッカー選手権大会

stable_structure.zh: 经都道府县预选产生代表队的冬季全国高校赛事。
stable_structure.en: The winter national high-school championship, reached through prefectural qualification.

name.zh: 日本俱乐部青年 U18 锦标赛
name.native: 日本クラブユースサッカー選手権（U-18）大会

stable_structure.zh: 俱乐部青年队专属全国赛事。俱乐部 U18 也能参加高圆宫联赛，但本赛事不对高校足球部开放。
stable_structure.en: A national competition for club youth teams. Club academies also play in the Takamado leagues, but this event is not a school competition.

name.zh: 地区大学联赛
name.native: 地域大学リーグ

stable_structure.zh: 大学球队的全年地区联赛体系，并与全国大学赛事构成大学阶段的主要比赛环境。
stable_structure.en: Season-long regional university leagues that form the main university competition environment alongside national cups.

name.zh: 总理大臣杯全日本大学足球赛
name.en: Prime Minister's Cup All Japan University Tournament
name.native: 総理大臣杯全日本大学サッカートーナメント

stable_structure.zh: 大学球队参加的全国杯赛。
stable_structure.en: A national cup competition for university teams.

name.zh: 全日本大学足球锦标赛
name.native: 全日本大学サッカー選手権大会

stable_structure.zh: 大学赛季的全国性锦标赛。
stable_structure.en: A national championship at the university stage.

name.zh: JFA/J.League 特别指定球员制度
name.native: JFA・Jリーグ特別指定選手制度

stable_structure.zh: 符合条件的大学或高中注册球员可在保留原注册的同时参加指定 J.League 俱乐部活动，形成校园足球到职业队的桥梁。
stable_structure.en: Eligible university or high-school players can retain their school registration while participating with a designated J.League club, creating a bridge into the professional game.

name.zh: 韩国男足青训、学校与大学体系
name.en: Korea Republic men's youth, school and university system
name.native: 대한민국 남자 유소년·학교·대학 축구 체계

summary.zh: 韩国高中年龄层同时存在普通高中足球部和 K League 俱乐部 U18。部分俱乐部 U18 以合作高中名义参赛，因此母俱乐部与教育合作学校必须分别记录。
summary.en: Korea's high-school age band includes independent school teams and K League U18 academies. Some club academies compete under partner-school identities, so the parent club and education partner must be stored separately.

name.zh: KFA 全国高中联赛
name.native: 전국 고등 축구리그

stable_structure.zh: KFA 管理的高中年龄层联赛环境，既包含普通学校队，也可能出现以合作高中身份注册的职业俱乐部 U18。
stable_structure.en: The KFA high-school league environment includes independent schools and professional-club U18 teams registered through partner-school identities.

name.zh: 高中联赛王中王赛
name.native: 고등리그 왕중왕전

stable_structure.zh: 全国高中联赛体系的阶段性冠军赛；参赛身份应按当年竞赛规程核查。
stable_structure.en: The championship stage of the national high-school league system; entries must be checked against the rules for each season.

name.zh: K League Junior U18
name.native: K리그 주니어 U18

stable_structure.zh: K League 职业俱乐部 U18 梯队的全年联赛。球队常同时显示俱乐部梯队名和合作高中名。
stable_structure.en: The season-long league for K League club U18 academies, whose listings often pair the club academy with an education-partner high school.

name.zh: K League Junior U17
name.native: K리그 주니어 U17

stable_structure.zh: 职业俱乐部梯队的低年龄补充联赛，不等同于独立 U17 学校体系。
stable_structure.en: A younger-age competition attached to professional club academies, not a separate school system.

name.zh: K League 青少年锦标赛
name.native: K리그 유스 챔피언십

stable_structure.zh: K League 俱乐部青训队参加的集中赛会制赛事，与 Junior 全年联赛分开记录。
stable_structure.en: A tournament event for K League academies, recorded separately from the season-long Junior league.

name.zh: KFA U-League
name.native: 대학 U리그

stable_structure.zh: 韩国大学球队的主要联赛通道，是学校年龄层向职业足球过渡的重要阶段。
stable_structure.en: The main league pathway for Korean university teams and an important bridge from school-age football toward the professional game.

name.zh: Gimcheon Sangmu 成年军队球队
name.native: 김천상무프로축구단

stable_structure.zh: Gimcheon Sangmu 是成年职业军队球队，应作为服役阶段的职业路径节点，不归入 U18 青训梯队。
stable_structure.en: Gimcheon Sangmu is a senior professional military-service club and must be treated as an adult career node, not as a youth academy.
